{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of the Hollow King
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Path of the Hollow King]] is a specific path or set of techniques.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]]’s [[Path of the Hollow King]] emphasizes the property of [[Emptiness]] in [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Path of the Hollow King]] is a destruction [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
